title: User unauthorized to perform action
excerpt: The duplicate command in the API is broken. I’m a full admin in my organisation but the api keeps returning the error: “User unauthorized to perform action”. The problem is that even though it returns an error, the dupli…

posts.author: CacttusMan (Chris Godin)
posts.cookedHtml: The duplicate command in the API is broken. I’m a full admin in my organisation but the api keeps returning the error: “User unauthorized to perform action”. The problem is that even though it returns an error, the duplicate action goes through and perform the action.

posts.author: dipro (Dipro Bhowmik)
posts.cookedHtml: Spoke to Chris and closed this over a support ticket.
